name: Warren Hastings
majorContributions: Appointed under the Regulating Act 1773. Laid the foundation of civil administration in India.

name: Lord William Bentinck
majorContributions: Appointed under the Charter Act 1833. Known for abolishing Sati and introducing English education.

name: Lord Canning
majorContributions: GG during the 1857 revolt, became the first Viceroy under the GoI Act 1858.

name: Lord Minto
majorContributions: Known as the 'Father of Communal Electorate' for the 1909 Reforms.
